title: christella puberula
intro: Christella puberula, also known as the hairy lip fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Christella puberula include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Christella puberula can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
